# AI History Hub

> Explore AI development history and milestones across 20 languages. Find timeline of AI breakthroughs, key events, and historical context for artificial intelligence.

## Site Overview
- AI history events: 500+
- Supported languages: 20
- Page types: timeline, events, milestones, decades
- Base URL: https://history.ai-term-hub.com/

## Important Pages
- [Home](https://history.ai-term-hub.com/)
- [Timeline](https://history.ai-term-hub.com/en/timeline/)
- [Key Events](https://history.ai-term-hub.com/en/events/)
- [Decades](https://history.ai-term-hub.com/en/decades/)
- [Sitemap](https://history.ai-term-hub.com/sitemap.xml)
